title: Iceberg Invalid access: Can not convert empty value
description:
### Describe the bug
Seems related to a MERGE statement on Spark side.
### How to reproduce
With [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/23163459/spark.py) run `spark.py create`. Then in ClickHouse create the table with:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/t0/test/t0');
```
Run the merge in Spark with `spark.py merge`, then in ClickHouse:
```sql
OPTIMIZE TABLE t0;
--DB::Exception: Invalid access: Can not convert empty value.. (POCO_EXCEPTION)
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> executeQuery: Poco::Exception. Code: 1000, e.code() = 0, Invalid access: Can not convert empty value. (version 25.11.1.243 (official build)) (from 127.0.0.1:45302) (query 1, line 1) (in query: OPTIMIZE TABLE t0;), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::InvalidAccessException::InvalidAccessException(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000247db4f2
1. base/poco/Foundation/include/Poco/Dynamic/Var.h:164: int Poco::Dynamic::Var::convert<int>() const @ 0x00000000193b6f80
2. base/poco/JSON/include/Poco/JSON/Object.h:147: DB::IcebergMetadata::getHistory(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x00000000193a8d35
3. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:337: DB::IcebergMetadata::optimize(std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageInMemoryMetadata const> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings> const&) @ 0x00000000193a782b
4. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/DataLakeConfiguration.h:343: DB::DataLakeConfiguration<DB::StorageLocalConfiguration, DB::IcebergMetadata>::optimize(std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageInMemoryMetadata const> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::optional<DB::FormatSettings> const&) @ 0x00000000172f3973
5. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/StorageObjectStorage.cpp:457: DB::StorageObjectStorage::optimize(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageInMemoryMetadata const> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, bool, bool, std::vector<String, std::allocator<String>> const&, bool, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x0000000019148efe
6. src/Interpreters/InterpreterOptimizeQuery.cpp:84: DB::InterpreterOptimizeQuery::execute() @ 0x000000001b123ae9
7. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1603: DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::function<void ()>) @ 0x000000001b0c1642
8. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1812: DB::executeQuery(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) @ 0x000000001b0bb2b2
9. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:744: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x000000001e9fa1ee
10. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2818: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001ea13f64
11. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x000000002488efc7
12. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerDispatcher.cpp:115: Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() @ 0x000000002488f5a5
13. base/poco/Foundation/src/ThreadPool.cpp:205: Poco::PooledThread::run() @ 0x000000002482e73f
14. base/poco/Foundation/src/Thread_POSIX.cpp:341: Poco::ThreadImpl::runnableEntry(void*) @ 0x000000002482be11
15. start_thread @ 0x00000000000a27f1
16. __GI___clone3 @ 0x0000000000133b5c
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t0 (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test1'), (2, 'Test2'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, description VARCHAR, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, description, value) SELECT id, CONCAT(name, ' desc'), CAST(id AS FLOAT) * 1.5 FROM t0 WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Invalid access during OPTIMIZE TABLE on Iceberg
